verses.text: A meat offering of fine flour with oil and frankincense; a memorial is burnt, the rest is the priests'. Meat offering. The fruit of labour is given to God.
A meat offering of fine flour with oil and frankincense; a memorial is burnt, the rest is the priests'. Meat offering. The fruit of labour is given to God.
A meat offering of fine flour with oil and frankincense; a memorial is burnt, the rest is the priests'. Meat offering. The fruit of labour is given to God.
It may be baked in the oven, fried, or made in a pan. Various forms. God receives the gift however prepared.
It may be baked in the oven, fried, or made in a pan. Various forms. God receives the gift however prepared.
It may be baked in the oven, fried, or made in a pan. Various forms. God receives the gift however prepared.
It may be baked in the oven, fried, or made in a pan. Various forms. God receives the gift however prepared.
It is brought to the priest and burnt as a sweet savour. Offered. The fragrance rises to God.
It is brought to the priest and burnt as a sweet savour. Offered. The fragrance rises to God.
It is brought to the priest and burnt as a sweet savour. Offered. The fragrance rises to God.
No leaven or honey is burnt, but salt with every offering. Salt of covenant. Worship is to be pure and lasting.
No leaven or honey is burnt, but salt with every offering. Salt of covenant. Worship is to be pure and lasting.
No leaven or honey is burnt, but salt with every offering. Salt of covenant. Worship is to be pure and lasting.
A meat offering of firstfruits, green ears dried by fire. Firstfruits. The first and best is given.
